title: We Were Here
author: Josh
content: Shout out to We Were Here: A History of Black People and Alternative Music by Stephanie Phillips. Can't wait to dive in!

title: Every Noise at Once
author: Josh
content: Reached out to Glenn McDonald at Every Noise at Onceand got some feedback! Very grateful!

title: Welcome from Hacker News
author: Josh
content: Hello Hacker News people! Very much would welcome messages or suggestions! https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48678717

title: 923 Songs
author: Josh
content: I'm up to 923 songs now. Mainly struggling with 1930s and 1940s. Any suggestions send them my way!

title: Albums
author: Josh
content: I've added an albums section now. I have started this one at 1960. So only 700 albums.

title: Sonic Stories!
author: Josh
content: I've added a sister project where you can add memories of venues, places and scenes. Click on the Sonic Stories section.

title: New Forum Feature!
author: Josh
content: I've added forum. Post on there and I can add the info to the site.

title: New Community Comments Feature!
author: Josh
content: I've added a new section where you can leave comments or suggest tracks. Drop a note using the form below, and I'll add my favorites to this feed.

title: Loving the 90s picks
author: RadioLover99
content: Really enjoying the 1990s section, specifically the Portishead choices. Have you thought about adding Tricky to 1995?

title: Radio Time Machine
author: Sarah_T
content: The static effect between stations on the radio dial is such a great touch. It really feels like tuning an old AM radio.

title: Lewisham Archive Added
author: Josh
content: Just uploaded the new Lewisham community archive to the community search page. Check it out to see the latest additions.
